name: Rupee Devaluation + Import Pipeline Exposure
description: Currency shock hits dollar-denominated inventory pipeline

input_signals.content: SBP announcement: Pakistani Rupee depreciates 8.3% against USD this month. Current interbank rate PKR 285 per USD, highest level in 18 months. Further depreciation expected per analyst consensus.

Finance department report: 70% of our inventory is sourced as dollar-denominated imports. Current import pipeline: USD 2.3 million in transit. Landed cost increase estimated at PKR 52 million based on rate change.

Product margin analysis Q3: Gross margins on imported electronics currently at 18%. Post-devaluation projected margin: 9.2%. Three product categories projected to hit break-even or loss: Air Conditioners, LED TVs, Washing Machines.
